info.title: ADTModelGenerator
info.description: Provides the ADTModelGenerator command-line utility to inspect a zip file containing a RTDT model and generate an Azure Digital Twins JSON model definition.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Generates an Azure digital twins model file with ScaleOut real-time digital twin component based on ScaleOut real-time digital twin definition.

options.name: --adt_model_id
options.description:
Required. The name of an Azure digital twin
model identifier.

options.name: --display_name
options.description: The Azure digital twin model display name.

options.name: --rtdt_zip_file_path
options.description:
Required. The path to a ScaleOut real-time
digital twin model zip file that contains
either the model.json or appsettings.json
file as well as all the binaries used by a
real-time digital twin assembly. This zip
file will be updated at the end of a
successful run to add the
'AzureDigitalTwinModelName' parameter with
the 'adt_model_id' value.

options.name: --adt_model_json_file_path
options.description:
Required. The path to the output JSON file
that contains both Azure digital twin model
definition file with embedded ScaleOut
component.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validates an Azure digital twin model.

options.name: --adt_model_file_path
options.description:
Required. The path to an Azure digital twin model
file.
